title: Reusable Character Guardian Poster
sourceTitle: Skinny Teenage Scavenger Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable character guardian poster with small hero character contrasted against an oversized guardian figure, bold poster hierarchy, expressive props, and a clean graphic background. CHARACTER=skinny teenage scavenger with cyan twin-tail hair. CREATURE=colossal stitched kaiju plush guardian. PALETTE=electric cyan, neon pink, acid yellow, deep violet. BACKGROUND=flat turquoise sky. Subject: skinny teenage scavenger with cyan twin-tail hair and a tired, annoyed expression. Guardian Creature: colossal stitched kaiju plush guardian looming behind the subject. Palette: electric cyan, neon pink, acid yellow, and deep violet. Setting: flat turquoise sky with simplified poster depth. Wardrobe Detail: oversized geometric shirt, bandages, patched sleeves, and cyberpunk accessories. Poster Mood: chaotic but cute post-apocalyptic street energy. Subject: Make skinny teenage scavenger with cyan twin-tail hair and a tired, annoyed expression the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in flat turquoise sky with simplified poster depth. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use character-and-guardian poster layout preserving these mechanics: foreground small character versus oversized guardian silhouette, bright flat pop palette, worn streetwear and patched toy texture. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in character-and-guardian poster visual finish preserving these source cues: foreground small character versus oversized guardian silhouette, bright flat pop palette, worn streetwear and patched toy texture. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use electric cyan, neon pink, acid yellow, and deep violet. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Skinny Teenage Scavenger Poster Flat Turquoise Sky With Simplified Poster Depth

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable character guardian poster with small hero character contrasted against an oversized guardian figure, bold poster hierarchy, expressive props, and a clean graphic background. CHARACTER=skinny teenage scavenger with cyan twin-tail hair. CREATURE=colossal stitched kaiju plush guardian. PALETTE=electric cyan, neon pink, acid yellow, deep violet. BACKGROUND=flat turquoise sky. Subject: young desert courier with lime-green bob hair and a guarded side-eye expression. Guardian Creature: towering patchwork fox guardian made of soft toy fabric and repair seams. Palette: lime green, coral pink, butter yellow, and graphite violet. Setting: flat sunlit mint sky with minimal horizon detail. Wardrobe Detail: patched windbreaker, taped gloves, satchel straps, and scuffed kneepads. Poster Mood: playful survival-fantasy attitude with bold toy-poster appeal. Subject: Make young desert courier with lime-green bob hair and a guarded side-eye expression the clear hero subject.
